rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.062 governs officeholder campaign finance reporting and has no bearing on homestead exemption values.
quote: If an officeholder who becomes a candidate has reportable activity that is not reported under Subchapter D before the end of the period covered by the first report the candidate is required to file under this subchapter, the reportable activity shall be included in the first report filed under this subchapter instead of in a report filed under Subchapter D.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code campaign finance reporting provision.
